common.tryAgain: Try again or check the NatrocOS gateway.
common.noAlerts: No active alerts from the gateway.
common.backendNotice: Connected to the local NatrocOS gateway through the live API.

login.loginCopy: Monitor server health, apps, storage, and admin sessions from one calm workspace.
login.passwordHelp: At least eight characters. First login creates the local owner.

errors.invalidCredentials: Enter a username and a password with at least eight characters.
errors.authFailed: Sign-in failed. Check the owner account or the NatrocOS gateway.

dashboard.overviewCopy: Data is read directly from the local gateway, Docker runtime, and /NatrocOS storage root.

checkBackups.title: Check backups
checkBackups.detail: Validate the last local backup schedule.

exportDiagnostics.title: Export diagnostics
exportDiagnostics.detail: Prepare a snapshot of service logs and metadata.

openStore.title: Open catalog
openStore.detail: Jump to application templates ready for the install queue.

scanStorage.title: Storage scanned
scanStorage.detail: The /NatrocOS pool was refreshed from the gateway.

exportDiagnostics.title: Diagnostics ready
exportDiagnostics.detail: The diagnostics request was recorded for the backend service.

openStore.title: Catalog opened
openStore.detail: Choose an app template for the next install queue item.

refreshed.title: Telemetry refreshed
refreshed.detail: System, storage, and container data was refreshed from the gateway.

apps.empty: No containers are registered by the backend yet.

open.title: {app} opened
open.detail: The open action was sent to the gateway.

restart.title: {app} restarted
restart.detail: The restart command was sent to Docker through the gateway.

start.title: {app} started
start.detail: The start command was sent to Docker through the gateway.

stop.title: {app} stopped
stop.detail: The stop command was sent to Docker through the gateway.

errors.actionFailed: The app action could not be completed.

store.catalogCopy: Catalog entries are read from JSON files in /NatrocOS/store and served by the gateway.
store.emptyCopy: Change the search term or reset the filter.

errors.installFailed: The app could not be added to the install queue.

queued.title: {app} queued
queued.detail: The install request was sent to the gateway.

settings.profileCopy: Owner account, localization, and shell preferences from the backend session.
